name: seo-slug
description: SEO-friendly slugs with official Ukrainian transliteration (КМУ №55/2010 default, ДСТУ 9112:2021 optional). Tiny, zero-dependency, ESM-only TypeScript.
author: Dmytro (https://github.com/dmythro)

scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.build:js: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run lint:ci && bun run check-types && bun test && bun run build
